_about: Hand-painted ground rings and portal glyphs. Sources include Vertex Imagen 4 and Grok Imagine/SuperHeavy; production assets are resized to WebP.

_blend_modes.additive: THREE.AdditiveBlending — black bg disappears, color adds onto floor. Use for rune rings, telegraph rings, kill pops.
_blend_modes.normal: THREE.NormalBlending  — premultiplied alpha. Use only if texture has true alpha cutout.

ring_arcane.use: Generic ornate ground ring. Drop-in for ringGold callers.

ring_kill_elite.use: Crimson chaos-star kill ring for elites.

ring_kill_miniboss.use: Gold + violet lightning kill ring for mini-bosses.

kill_paw_poof.use: Compact paw-shaped enemy-death dust poof; never reads as an interactive ground ring.

portal_catacomb_outer.use: Outer rotating glyph for catacomb entrance/exit.

portal_forest_gateway.use: Grok/SuperHeavy root-and-crystal gateway silhouette for Forest room portals.

catacomb_yarn_paw.use: Grok/SuperHeavy enchanted-yarn paw rune for dungeon traps and objectives.

catacomb_specter.use: Grok/SuperHeavy spectral-cat silhouette for dungeon-only enemy roles and ghost processions.

aoe_danger.use: Red danger telegraph for AoE windups.

spawn_ring.use: Conjuring sigil for enemy summon / elite-pack spawn.

pickup_paw_aura.use: Grok/SuperHeavy broken-whisker paw badge beneath bomb, magnet, and chicken consumables; replaces generic yellow rings.

forest_tar_bog.use: Grok/SuperHeavy irregular paw-print tar hazard; Forest slow and damage zone.

weapon_burger.use: Grok/SuperHeavy camera-facing Cheesy Burgers orbital weapon sprite.

weapon_burger_toxic.use: Grok/SuperHeavy evolved double burger with acid-lime cheese and paw rune.

weapon_paw_comet.use: Grok/SuperHeavy directional paw-and-yarn magic projectile; replaces anonymous blue orb missiles.

enemy_cat_spirit_bolt.use: Grok/SuperHeavy directional spectral-cat hostile bolt; instance-tinted for magic, fire, and ice.

xp_paw_crystal.use: Grok/SuperHeavy faceted paw-crystal XP pickup; instance-tinted by value tier.

pickup_weapon_relic.use: Grok/SuperHeavy paw medallion wrapped in enchanted yarn; interactive Forest weapon drop.

helltide_tortured_gift.use: Grok/SuperHeavy crimson cat reliquary for the 50-Ember Tortured Gift interactable.

bh_floor.use: Bullet-hell arena floor mandala. Full opaque base map for the arena disc (not additive).

aoe_fire.use: Orange fire explosion / burn nova. Fire-element AoE bursts.

aoe_nova_pawburst.use: Grok/SuperHeavy pearly paw-and-yarn ground seal for the player Nova active; depth-tested below actors.

aoe_frost.use: Icy crystalline frost nova. Frost/cold AoE bursts + freeze pulses.

aoe_shock.use: Cyan lightning nova, radiating arcs. Shock/chain AoE bursts.

aoe_holy.use: Golden radiant holy nova. Light/heal/smite AoE bursts.

aoe_void.use: Purple void spiral implosion. Void/arcane AoE + boss tells.

aoe_poison.use: Toxic green poison cloud burst. Poison/acid AoE clouds.

aoe_shockwave.use: Clean white expanding energy ring. Generic shockwave / knockback pulse (tintable).

aoe_beam.use: Vertical cyan energy beam column. Lance/prism/wisp beam weapons (tintable).

aoe_roots.use: Radial thorny root tangle. rootGrasp / nature snare ground AoE.

aoe_slash.use: Curved crescent slash arc. briarWhip / melee sweep hits (tintable).

aoe_lava.use: Molten lava pool. Cinder stage hazard + camper signalfire zone (bake orange).

aoe_field.use: Neutral glowing rune field disc. rootGrasp / sapWeaver persistent fields (white base, per-instance tint).

aoe_crater.use: Red danger-zone crater. Meteor-strike inner disc (bake red).

aoe_ascension.use: Ornate golden ascension halo. Evolution rim around hero (tintable per character).
